Assets.Subject: Optimize Your Hiring with Voice AI – Hunar.ai"
Assets.Body:
Hi {{First Name}}
I’m reaching out to introduce Hunar.ai, an AI-powered voice automation platform built for high-volume, frontline hiring.
We help companies streamline recruitment by automating time-consuming tasks such as:
• Automated screening calls to qualify candidates at scale • Interview scheduling & reminders to improve show-up rates • Multilingual candidate engagement across Indian languages • Document collection & onboarding workflows • Workforce engagement like feedback and attendance reminders
With Hunar.ai, teams can handle thousands of candidates simultaneously, reduce hiring turnaround time by up to 50%, and significantly cut recruitment costs.
I’d love to understand your current hiring process and explore how we can support your team. Would you be open to a quick 15-minute call next week?
Looking forward to connecting.
Best regards, Mohit Chitkara Hunar.ai 7652804519
